misc: Primary organizer of the Hector Trophée event.
biography: Toni, a name synonymous with the very fabric of the Hector Trophée, stands as the primary organizer and a perennial competitor. Hailing from Hirsala Golf, his profound dedication to the event extends far beyond the fairways, underpinning its consistent success and growth since its inception.

As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, Toni is set to embark on his 13th consecutive appearance, a testament to his unwavering commitment and passion for the competition. His competitive record is equally distinguished, featuring an impressive three victories in the coveted Hector Trophée team event. Furthermore, Toni has twice ascended to the pinnacle of individual achievement, claiming the prestigious Victor Trophy on two separate occasions, a remarkable feat that underscores his prowess in both individual and paired formats.

Toni's continuous presence and consistent pursuit of excellence have cemented his status as a foundational pillar of the tournament. His unique blend of organizational acumen and competitive spirit not only shapes the Hector Trophée's future but also enriches its storied past, making his participation in the upcoming event one of particular significance.
